title: Big Barker vs GetPawsy Orthopedic Dog Beds – Honest Comparison
seoTitle: Big Barker vs GetPawsy Dog Beds – 2026 Comparison
metaDescription: Big Barker vs GetPawsy orthopedic dog beds: we compare foam density, thickness, waterproofing, price, and warranty. Which is the better value?
author: GetPawsy Pet Care Team

sections.heading: Why This Comparison Matters
sections.content:
Big Barker is the most recognized name in premium orthopedic dog beds. GetPawsy curates high-quality orthopedic beds at more accessible price points. Both serve the same goal: genuine joint support for dogs that need it.

This comparison looks at what actually matters: foam performance, durability, features, and total cost of ownership.

sections.heading: Head-to-Head Specs
sections.content:
Foam Density: Big Barker 2.0+ lb/ft³ | GetPawsy top picks 1.8–2.0 lb/ft³

Thickness: Big Barker 7" | GetPawsy 5–7" (varies by model)

Waterproof Liner: Big Barker sold separately ($50+) | GetPawsy included

Cover: Both machine-washable, removable

CertiPUR-US: Big Barker yes | GetPawsy select models

Warranty: Big Barker 10 years | GetPawsy 30-day guarantee + standard manufacturer warranty

Price: Big Barker $200–$350 | GetPawsy $45–$150

For more details on our offerings: browse all orthopedic beds

sections.heading: Where Big Barker Wins
sections.content:
10-year warranty: Big Barker's standout feature. If the foam flattens more than 10% over a decade, they replace it. No one else offers this.

American-made foam: Manufactured in the US with tightly controlled foam specs.

Brand trust: Years of vet endorsements and a focused product line (only large dog beds).

sections.heading: Where GetPawsy Wins
sections.content:
Price-to-performance: GetPawsy's top orthopedic beds deliver 90%+ of Big Barker's support at 40–60% of the price.

Variety: Options for all sizes (small to giant), styles (flat, bolster, cooling), and budgets ($45–$150).

Included waterproofing: TPU liners come standard on most models — Big Barker charges extra.

Broader use cases: Cooling beds for hot climates, bolster beds for anxious dogs, budget options for multi-dog homes.

See our recommendations: best for large dogs · best for senior dogs

sections.heading: The Verdict
sections.content:
If budget is no concern and you want maximum warranty protection for a single large dog, Big Barker is the safe choice.

If you want excellent orthopedic support at a significantly lower price — or need beds for multiple dogs, different sizes, or specific features like cooling or bolsters — GetPawsy offers better overall value.

Both are vastly superior to any standard polyester-fill bed from a big box store. The most important thing is choosing any genuine orthopedic bed over a standard bed.

Browse our full collection: orthopedic dog beds

faq.question: Is Big Barker better than GetPawsy?
faq.answer: Big Barker has slightly higher foam density and a 10-year warranty. GetPawsy offers comparable orthopedic support at 40–60% lower price with included waterproof liner and more style options. Both are excellent choices.

faq.question: Can GetPawsy beds support 100+ lb dogs?
faq.answer: Yes. Our Dual-Layer Heavy-Duty model is rated for dogs up to 150 lbs with 7 inches of high-density foam, comparable to Big Barker's flagship.
